results.title: Sanjay Seth emphasises yoga’s global importance; Irfan Ansari describes health as ‘greatest wealth’
results.description: Union Minister Sanjay Seth emphasizes yoga's role in global health on International Yoga Day, promoting the theme 'Yoga for Healthy Ageing'.

results.title: Om Birla highlights yoga’s role in mental peace and discipline on International Yoga Day
results.description: On International Yoga Day, Om Birla led a yoga session, stressing yoga's role in mental peace, emotional balance, and a disciplined lifestyle for all.
